title: Saving and Resetting
description: Handling form submission and resetting fields.

slides.title: Save and Reset 💾
slides.content:
# Form Submission and Reset

* `_formKey.currentState!.save()` – calls the `onSaved` callback for each form field.
* `_formKey.currentState!.reset()` – resets all fields to their initial value.

Use `onSaved` to collect the final validated data.

quizData.question: When is the onSaved callback of a form field called?
quizData.explanation: onSaved is triggered by calling save() on the FormState.

slides.title: Save and Reset Example
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use onSaved for final data collection

onSaved is called only after validation passes, so it's safe to store the data there.
